seoTitle: Mersen News | Product Innovations, Industry Updates
seoDescription: Latest news from Mersen including new fuse products, technology innovations, and industry developments in electrical protection.

news.title: Mersen Introduces Enhanced Fuse Series for SiC Applications
news.summary: New PC series fuses optimized for Silicon Carbide (SiC) MOSFET protection with ultra-low I2t and fast opening characteristics.
news.content:
Mersen has introduced enhanced high-speed fuses specifically designed for Silicon Carbide (SiC) MOSFET protection in advanced power electronics applications. The enhanced PC series features ultra-low I2t values and optimized opening characteristics to protect fast-switching SiC devices.

Key features include:
- Ultra-low I2t for SiC protection
- 1000V-1500V ratings for high-voltage applications
- Fast opening <1ms
- 200kA breaking capacity
- Compact Size 3 footprint

The new fuses address the growing adoption of SiC technology in EV charging, renewable energy, and industrial power conversion.

news.title: Mersen Launches Complete EV Charging Protection Portfolio
news.summary: Comprehensive protection solution for DC fast charging stations including high-speed fuses, DC fuses, and surge protection.
news.content:
Mersen has launched a complete portfolio of protection devices for electric vehicle charging infrastructure. The solution includes high-speed fuses for power module protection, DC fuses for battery and DC link protection, and surge protective devices for input protection.

The portfolio covers:
- 350kW+ fast charging applications
- 800V and 1000V architectures
- Indoor and outdoor installations
- Coordinated protection schemes

All products are UL and IEC certified for global deployment.

news.title: LiTong Expands Mersen Distribution Partnership
news.summary: LiTong Electronics strengthens partnership with Mersen to enhance technical support and inventory in Asia-Pacific.
news.content:
LiTong Electronics and Mersen have announced an expansion of their distribution partnership to better serve the growing Asia-Pacific market for electrical protection solutions.

The expanded partnership includes:
- Increased inventory of high-speed and DC fuses
- Enhanced FAE technical support
- Joint customer training programs
- Faster sample delivery
- Local stock for urgent requirements

This partnership supports the rapid growth in EV, renewable energy, and industrial automation markets in the region.
